full_text:
Yan Jun
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Junwas born in Wuwei. Local warlord, sent family as hostages and begged Cao Cao for help but was refused, killed that year by He Luan. Yan Jun lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
